collision energy: higher-energy collisional dissociation collision energy was set to 28% nce
fragmentation method: the data-dependent instrument method consisted of MS1... followed by up to 15 MS/MS scans
instrument: analyzed on an Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
labeling: the fluorescence changes observed with labeled b5 proteins are indicative of productive interactions with P450 17A1.
reduction reagent: the requirement for a high concentration of DTT (10 mM)
reduction concentration: the requirement for a high concentration of DTT (10 mM)
